primary_wedge: A 90‑day, Swiss‑hosted pilot timed for shoulder season that delivers weekly revenue actions and clean direct‑revenue attribution, replacing fragmented tools and agency tasks
primary_blocker: Unproven direct-booking attribution and PMS/booking-engine integration access/timelines.
deal_killer: No reliable PMS/booking-engine integration for direct booking attribution.
outreach_angle: Propose a Swiss-hosted 90-day pilot scheduled for a shoulder month, priced in the CHF 1.5–2k band with monthly opt-out. Commit to Day-0 integration plan with their PMS/booking engine, an attribution blueprint (UTMs, BE event tracking, holdout/A-B on key website modules), and weekly 30‑minute revenue standups. Show a live dashboard demo plus one Swiss luxury reference, and use an ROI calculator tailored to Zermatt seasonality (focus on peak weeks). Define success as ≥5% direct revenue uplift and replacement of current manual/compset workflows; offer to offset part of fees via performance milestones if attribution is met.
disagreements: deal_killer: GM="No reliable PMS/booking-engine integration for direct booking attribution." vs CM="No reliable PMS/booking-engine integration (cannot ingest real-time bookings/rates)"

primary_wedge: Low-risk, Swiss-hosted 60–90 day pilot tied to a clear direct-booking KPI with PMS attribution, delivering a weekly action plan that saves management/agency hours.
primary_blocker: Owner pushback on recurring spend and contract length without local proof and KPI guarantees.
outreach_angle: Propose a Swiss‑hosted, PMS‑integrated 90‑day pilot at CHF 1.2k–1.8k/month with monthly opt‑out and an upgrade path only if KPIs are hit (+5pp direct‑share or +10% direct‑booking revenue within 6 months). Include a live dashboard demo, a Swiss 40–60 room reference, clear DPA/GDPR documents, and a weekly prioritized action plan tailored to a 49‑room team. Keep setup under 30 days, minimize staff time, and offer annual discount or performance pricing upon successful pilot.
disagreements: deal_killer: GM="no_pms_integration" vs CM="No demonstrable uplift in direct bookings (or credible attribution path) within the agreed proof period."

primary_wedge: A Swiss-hosted, PMS-integrated 90-day pilot priced in the 1–2k/month band that replaces part of agency spend and produces a weekly, 3-step action list with attributable direct-revenue and OTA-commission savings
primary_blocker: Owner/finance skepticism about ROI attribution and added operational burden, compounded by PMS/CRS integration lead times and potential agency resistance.
deal_killer: Failure to demonstrate attributable ROI on direct bookings/revenue within the pilot window or inability to satisfy Swiss‑hosted GDPR/data‑governance requirements.
outreach_angle: Lead with Swiss luxury references and a live dashboard demo that shows compset moves and how actions are generated. Propose a 90‑day, Swiss‑hosted pilot at CHF 1.5–2k/month, month‑to‑month, with white‑glove onboarding and confirmed PMS/BE data flow. Success metric: +10% direct bookings OR equivalent uplift in direct revenue plus replaced agency hours. Time the start to a shoulder period; commit to a 30‑minute weekly cadence and provide DE/EN/IT content packs for offers, events, and wellness to reduce workload.
disagreements: deal_killer: GM="Failure to demonstrate attributable ROI on direct bookings/revenue within the pilot window or inability to satisfy Swiss‑hosted GDPR/data‑governance requirements." vs CM="No credible PMS/booking engine integration preventing attribution of actions to direct revenue uplift"

primary_wedge: Attribution-first, Swiss-hosted 60–90 day pilot tailored to the contact-only flow, with performance-linked pricing and owner-grade ROI reporting.
primary_blocker: Inability to produce clean, auditable attribution from contact enquiries to confirmed bookings; the owner will not approve recurring spend without this.
deal_killer: No reliable integration to track enquiries and attribute direct bookings (cannot prove revenue uplift).
outreach_angle: Lead with a low-friction, Swiss-hosted 60-day pilot scheduled for shoulder season. Commit to building bespoke connectors for the contact form, tracked emails, and call logs to attribute revenue, and preload a Zermatt luxury compset for peak-date alerts. Deliver a single weekly action email (pricing, offers, outreach targets) and keep guest-facing automation opt-in/approval-only to protect brand tone. Provide two Swiss luxury references, a clear ROI calculator, and performance-linked pricing options. Offer white-glove onboarding and a monthly opt-out after the pilot to de-risk owner sign-off.
disagreements: deal_killer: GM="No reliable integration to track enquiries and attribute direct bookings (cannot prove revenue uplift)." vs CM="No credible attribution to incremental direct revenue in the contact-only booking flow within a short pilot."

primary_wedge: Performance‑linked 60–90 day Swiss‑hosted pilot focused on shoulder‑season direct revenue and OTA commission reduction, delivering a simple weekly action plan (reviews, multilingual content, targeted offers) that replaces agency/manual time; start with light tracking and upgrade to PMS integration once results are visible.
primary_blocker: Owner/Finance insist on audited, local proof of net direct revenue uplift and are averse to a CHF 3k–5k recurring commitment.
deal_killer: No credible, local proof that hotels of similar size see net direct revenue uplift within 3–6 months.
outreach_angle: Propose a 90-day shoulder-season pilot at CHF 1.5–2k/month with Swiss/GDPR hosting, native PMS/BE integration, and white-glove 2-week onboarding. Commit to 3–5 prioritized weekly actions, couples/wellness package tests, and compset-tuned pricing prompts. Make success criteria explicit (≥10% direct revenue uplift or agreed KPI bundle) with refund/credit and monthly opt-out. Bring one Swiss luxury reference and a live dashboard demo up front.
disagreements: deal_killer: GM="No credible, local proof that hotels of similar size see net direct revenue uplift within 3–6 months." vs CM="Cannot prove or credibly attribute direct‑booking uplift during the pilot, or failure to achieve workable PMS/booking‑engine tracking for measurement."
